summary: A comprehensive PRD for an advanced Word to PDF conversion tool named 'ProPDF Word Converter'. Covers complete iLovePDF function mapping (~18 functions), 100+ ProPDF features across 14 modules including AI-powered conversion, batch processing, formatting fidelity engine, template system, PDF/A-PDF/X compliance, watermarking, merge-then-convert workflows, API for developers, real-time preview, and more. Includes competitive analysis, user personas, technical architecture, monetization, roadmap, and risk analysis.
